name: andrej-karpathy-skills
description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.

core_principles.name: Think Before Coding
core_principles.description: Don't assume. Don't hide confusion. Surface tradeoffs.
core_principles.addresses: Wrong assumptions, hidden confusion, missing tradeoffs

core_principles.name: Simplicity First
core_principles.description: Minimum code that solves the problem. Nothing speculative.

core_principles.name: Surgical Changes
core_principles.description: Touch only what you must. Clean up only your own mess.
core_principles.addresses: Orthogonal edits, touching code you shouldn't

core_principles.name: Goal-Driven Execution
core_principles.description: Define success criteria. Loop until verified.
core_principles.addresses: Leverage through tests-first, verifiable success criteria

karpathy_problems: Wrong assumptions made silently without checking
Overcomplication of code and APIs, bloated abstractions
Side-effect changes to code/comments not understood
